CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Performance_Management_Record__c)), Performance_Management_Record__r.Name, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Risk__c)), Risk__r.Name, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Fraud_Error__c)), Fraud_Error__r.Name, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Funding_Award__c)), Funding_Award__r.Name, "No Parent" ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Action Parent Name
